title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Whirlpool India Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Whirlpool India Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Whirlpool India Advisory Limited in Madurai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Whirlpool India Advisory Limited:
Whirlpool India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Whirlpool India Advisory Limited!
